raw: {"perspective": "PR & Media", "position": "for", "argument": "Finalizing the press narrative is the single highest-leverage action that improves everything downstream. With a clear press narrative, we can effectively communicate our value proposition to the market, attracting potential users, investors, and partners. This will unblock other tasks such as applying for the GITA grant, preparing for startup competitions, and building the CEO's LinkedIn presence.", "strongest_counter": "Some might argue that developing a minimum viable product (MVP) for one of the five products should be the priority, as it would provide tangible proof of concept and potentially generate early revenue.", "evidence_cited": "ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md, specifically the sections on user experience and market validation", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
argument: Finalizing the press narrative is the single highest-leverage action that improves everything downstream. With a clear press narrative, we can effectively communicate our value proposition to the market, attracting potential users, investors, and partners. This will unblock other tasks such as applying for the GITA grant, preparing for startup competitions, and building the CEO's LinkedIn presence.
strongest_counter: Some might argue that developing a minimum viable product (MVP) for one of the five products should be the priority, as it would provide tangible proof of concept and potentially generate early revenue.
evidence_cited: ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md, specifically the sections on user experience and market validation
